entry.title: How can we add the Private Key Alias in the channel configuration when using TPM?
entry.content:
Hi all,

we are facing the problem that we are not able to add the Private Key Alias in the TPM configuration for Trading Partner AS2 Sender channel. The filed remains grey with no option to add the Private Key Alias.

Can you advise what we are missing?

Regards
David

entry.title: Re: The Easy Way To Deploy Any LLM In SAP AI Core
entry.content:
Hi Max,

There is an internal process in place to publish sample code. Will send it to you via email. Cheers.

Kind Regards,
Yatsea

entry.title: Re: How can we add the Private Key Alias in the channel c...
entry.content:
Hello,

Certainly! It seems you’re encountering an issue with the Private Key Alias in the TPM configuration for the Trading Partner AS2 Sender channel. Let’s troubleshoot this:

Private Key Alias for Decryption (Inbound):
The Company (typically the B2B system owner) owns a public-private key pair.
The public key is shared with partners, who encrypt sensitive content using it.
To decrypt messages, the Company uses its private key.
Configure the private key alias in the Security tab of the Company Profile against the user who sends messages to integration flows at runtime.
Signature Verification (Inbound for both messages & MDN):
The Trading partner (your partner) owns a key pair.
They share their public key/certificate with your Company.
When sending messages, the partner creates a message digest and signature using their private key.
Your Company verifies the signature using the partner’s public key.
Upload the partner’s public certificate to the Certificate tab of the Trading Partner profile, and configure signature verification in the Security tab against the AS2 Partner ID.
Encryption (Outbound):
Your Company encrypts data using the partner’s public key.
On the partner’s side, the private key is used to decrypt the message.
Configure AS2 Receiver Communication under Systems tab of the Company/Trading Partner Profiles.
Signing (Outbound for both messages & MDN):  florida blue member login
Your Company creates a message digest and signature using its own private key.
The partner validates the signature using your Company’s public key.
Configure AS2 Receiver Communication under Systems tab of the Company/Trading Partner Profiles.

Best Regards

esther598

entry.title: Re: Bring Open-Source LLMs into SAP AI Core
entry.content:
As of 9 July 2024, Concurrency is now enabled by default since Ollama v0.2. This unlocks 2 major features:

  • Parallel requests
  • Run multiple models as long as enough GPU memory

Source: https://x.com/ollama/status/1810480544976626159

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hello @David_Chaviano 

I hold a master's degree in computer application. I have worked for different positions and different domain since I postgraduate. I worked in Customer service, Escalations, Support, IT Sales. I am willing to learn more about SAP, as it will help me get job opportunities and establish a career. 

Further, I am excited about the SAP Learning digital skills initiative. For the past three years, I've been on a career break, a period filled with personal challenges and growth of myself.

I am highly motivated to learn SAP and I would love to be a part of it.

entry.title: Re: How to add "Audience" to the oauth token method used in charon integration
entry.content: Thank you @adamreisberg for more clarity. My intent was to leverage the platform capabilities and have a standardized approach so that our team's development time can be reduced. For example, if I select FeignClient over Charon, I can't leverage any of the platform capabilities, like managing the configuration in Destination objects. So, I would prefer "WebClient" over FeignClient as the later one has blocking nature. Thanks once again for the quick response.

entry.title: Enablement Configuration Setting for Stories in People Analytics
entry.content:
Have you been wondering how to ensure all the enablement configurations are set up in SAP SuccessFactors to ensure Stories in People Analytics are working? Look no further than this IDP - SAP SuccessFactors Stories in People Analytics: Enablement Configurations - and this blog introducing this topic to you.

Let us examine the initial and post-activation enablement configuration settings to ensure Story reports work seamlessly in your SAP SuccessFactors system. For IPS connector details, please read through the Section 5 of the IDP before executing Step 1. If you are still using SF ODATA IPS connector, we recommend you to migrate from ODATA to SCIM IPS connector before initiating the Stories in People Analytics Upgrade Center task.

There are 4 Steps to follow before you can start using Stories in People Analytics, as mentioned below:

Step 1: Enable Stories via Upgrade Center Task

Log in to SuccessFactors > Go to Admin Center> Navigate to Upgrade Center. Choose 'Stories in People Analytics' and upgrade. Check for a successful upgrade via the “View Recently Completed Upgrades” link in the Upgrade Center. Once the task is successfully submitted, you may have to wait for 45-60 minutes for backend configuration jobs to successfully complete. 

                                                         Upgrade Center

Post- Enablement Steps

Step 2: Conditional Authentication configuration for Corporate Identity provider

If your organization does not use Corporate Identity Provider, you can skip to Step 3: IPS user sync. If your organization has Corporate Identity Provider, please follow the below guidelines to add additional settings, validate and ensure configuration in Identity Authentication is compatible to run Story reports.

a) Log on to the Identity Authentication Service as an IAS admin and go to Applications & Resources, select the Applications tab.

b) In the Bundled Applications section, choose the SAP Analytics Cloud tenant (mostly configured as SF Analytics). It is configured either at the same level as the SAP SuccessFactors tenant, or under the SAP SuccessFactors tenant as its child application.

c) Edit the Conditional Authentication details.

d) Ensuring that the set of rules used for the SAP Analytics Cloud tenant and the SAP SuccessFactors tenant are the same. This should be already set in SAP analytics cloud tenant is tagged as a child application to SuccessFactors tenant.

e) In the Default Identity Provider field, select the Identity Provider that you are using to authenticate users on the SAP SuccessFactors tenant, and save the changes.

Go to Identity Providers, select the Corporate Identity Providers tab, and select your corporate identity provider. 

  • Ensure that the Forward All SSO Requests to Corporate IdP option in the SINGLE SIGNON section has been disabled.
  • Configure Identity Federation, enable the Use Identity Authentication user store option in the User Store section, and save the changes.

Before activating Stories, if you need help with setting up Corporate IdP with IAS / SuccessFactors, please review detailed steps and SF-IAS architecture in the KBA - Configuring SSO between Corporate IdP, Identity Authentication tenant and SuccessFactors.

Step 3: IPS user sync

At this step, it is important to know if your systems are configured with ODATA IPS connector or SCIM IPS connector to synchronize users between SAP SuccessFactors, IAS, and SAP Analytics Cloud tenant.  If you are Using ODATA IPS connector, you will need to ensure below permissions. • Manage Integration Tool- Allow Admin to Access OData API through Basic Authentication • Manage User Employee Export Using SCIM IPS connector? SCIM IPS connector with client certificate authentication, does not have any pre-requisites of permissions.

For a more detailed description of step 3 along with system screenshots, I invite you to read through page 12 of the IDP.

Step 4: Grant Story report permissions

We strongly recommend following the help guide documentation to set up permission related to Story Reports. Some modules (ex. RCM/PM/GM etc.) require additional permissions to ensure a user can report on schema specific data. Link to help guide - Set up Permission for Story report.

There are other topics of interest like the FAQs, important notes on if your systems are configured on SCIM IPS connector and you want to ensure permission-based sync relevant configurations and attribute, performing user synchronization that are mentioned in the IDP.

entry.title: Re: How to trigger Build Process Automation (BPA) workflo...
entry.content:
I do not know if there is a special shortcut in SAP Business Application Studio as there is in SAP Build Apps, but you probably do this best by calling the SAP Build Process Automation APIS:

https://api.sap.com/package/SAPProcessAutomation/rest

The triggering API is under the Workflow tile. You need a service key and destination (generally created for you when you install Process Automation).

entry.title: Re: SAP Build app transaction data not being saved to Visual cloud function DB
entry.content: I am assuming your data variable is of type new (not list or single record) - this is an important piece of information. And as @Jakub_Roguski mentioned, best to show where you populate that "new" type of data variable, which is empty by default. Also, it is worthwhile checking the Developer Tools when clicking the submit button, because you can see the payload being sent and therefore whether the record is being populated.

entry.title: Re: SAP Build app transaction data not being saved to Visual cloud function DB
entry.content: I am assuming your data variable is of type new (not list or single record) - this is an important piece of information.

entry.title: Re: eInvoice Email-Process - Process Status is stuck on "Request Acknowledged" in the eDoc
entry.content:
Dear Lukas,

thank you for reaching out to us. The status in the backend system shall update, to allow you further actions like sending the mail. If you have walked through the steps listed here Integrating Peppol Exchange with SAP S/4HANA Cloud | SAP Help Portal, and there is no error in the document monitor, and the document does not update in the backend system, please open an incident for component LOD-LH-DRC-PAP, so we can have a look into it.

For step Setting Up Connectivity | SAP Help Portal, please check the following instructions:

  1. In the BTP Subaccount, go to Connectivity -> Destination and go to "Certificates"
    1. Choose "Generate New Certificate"
      1. Certificate Name - any meaningful name
        File Extension PFX
        Remember the Password
    2. Select the new certificate in your destination to the backend system and provide Authentication "Internet" and "ClientCertificateAuthentication"
      1. your Certificate needs to be selected in "Key Store Location"
      2. Provide the Password from above.
      3. Save the Destination
      4.  Export the private certificate as PFX file
    3. Verify the path of your Destination, according to Creating Communication Arrangements | SAP Help Portal , ...Inbound Communication > Inbound Services | The system automatically creates the service URL when you create the communication arrangement. You must enter this URL in the Destination in SAP BTP. See Setting Up Connectivity....
  2. Open the certificate locally and import to your PC's key store
    1. provide your password when asked
    2. go to your local PC's Key Store ("Manage User Certificates" in Windows)
    3. find your certificate and export  it to your local drive
      1. do not export the private key
  3. In S/4 HANA Cloud Switch to your Communication System with Communication Scenario SAP_COM_0529 (the current Communication system for Peppol Exchange)
    1. upload the certificate to your existing Communication User
  4. Reprocess your Documents in the Peppol Exchange App.
  5. If you still receive the error, the Participant might have to be deleted and recreated

Regards,

Uwe

entry.title: Start Time ,end time & paygrade mapping in document generation not working
entry.content:
Hi team,

I hope this message finds you well. I wanted to bring to your attention an issue we've encountered with our document generation process. Specifically, we've mapped the start time and end time of short leaves in our template, but unfortunately, this data is not reflecting in the custom mail notifications.

 

  1. start time & end time is not reflecting in mail notification
  2. pay grade is not reflecting in mail notification

    We only are able to map reference fields in the leave template & unable to find the fields in reference. If we are mapping start time, end time & paygrade of the employee as direct fields, in custom mail notification its not appearing. PFA the screenshot.

    Could you please look into this matter at your earliest convenience? It seems there may be a disconnect between how the data is mapped in the template and how it appears in the notifications.

    Your prompt attention to this issue would be greatly appreciated.

Patro

entry.title: Re: Message No. QV164 - Inspection Lot created via Action...
entry.content:
Greetings,

can you confirm that you have properly setup the activity in the action box:

  1. Function module: QMLR_CREATE_INSP_LOT
  2. Function module when saving: QMLR_CREATE_INSP_LOT_STEP2

Seems to me you are missing configuration - the second function module is not assigned to activity and it is not executed.

Best regards, Matjaž.

entry.title: Re: Task 4 - Plain "REST" endpoint (July Developer Challenge - "Reverse APIs")
entry.content:
Nicely observed! I love it when folks have eagle eyes 🙂 

It is simply because I wanted to "normalise" the task identifiers, mostly because I load the tasks dynamically in the TESTER, like this:

Each task's requirement is encapsulated into a separate JS file.

But also partially because it makes reporting (via the Testlog entity set) easier and more consistent.

cheers!

dj

entry.title: Re: eInvoice Email-Process - Process Status is stuck on "...
entry.content:
@Uwe_K Thank you for your help. I have double checked the settings and they seem to be correct. But since posting the question i found out, that the DRC Service we use is a test version and that we as a sender (and reciever) are not registered in the Peppol network and have only subscribed to the service (DRC and Peppol Exchange) on the BTP and added ourselfes as the only participant there. Could this be the cause of the issue ? We assumed that no registration in the Peppol Network is needed if we only use the Email Process, is this correct ?


Best regards

Lukas

entry.title: Can SAP PAPM run on SAP Datasphere Only?
entry.content:
Hello,
Can SAP PAPM run on SAP Datasphere Only?
(if the company haven't SAP Hana or others SAP technologies)

entry.title: Re: Error Message : Employee XXXX does not exist or is not authorized as purchaser responsible
entry.content:
See note 2652765:

Search for the following roles in transaction PFCG: /SRMSMC/* and assign the appropriate one to the user.

If you are using custom roles make sure to set the proper role attribute for /SRMSMC/PFCG_ROLE_ATTRIBUTES under the Personalization tab in PFCG.

In the custom roles, make sure that following authorization objects are included:

/SRMSMC/BO
/SRMSMC/R3 - for purchasing categories
/SRMSMC/R4 - for supplier evaluations
/SRMSMC/R5 - for questionnaires

entry.title: SAP on PaaS Cloud SQL di GCP
entry.content:
dear expert,

I need to know if is possible to migrate a SAP Microsoft SQL DATABASE to GCP Cloud SQL PaaS. Is it certified for SAP?
if so, is it possible to have a SAP NOTE that clarifies the steps to perform this or that certifies the feasibility of this data migration from a classic Microsoft SQL toGCP Cloud SQL PaaS?

regards, 





------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: SAP on PaaS Cloud SQL di GCP
entry.content:
Google Cloud SQL does not support SAP applications. SAP has specific requirements for database platforms, and not all cloud databases as a service (DBaaS) are certified for use with SAP.

SAP typically certifies specific database versions for use with their applications, and this certification process ensures that the database can support the performance, scalability, and reliability demands of SAP software. For databases, SAP commonly certifies solutions like SAP HANA, Microsoft SQL Server, Oracle, IBM DB2, and MaxDB, among others.

For running SAP on Google Cloud, you would typically look at using Google Cloud's Compute Engine (IaaS) to run SAP applications on certified operating systems and databases. You would manage the database yourself, just as you would on-premises or in a virtual machine in another cloud environment.

Also see: https://help.sap.com/docs/SUPPORT_CONTENT/virtualization/3362185796.html

entry.title: Re: Applying Clean Code Principles in SAP UI5 Development - Reality check
entry.content: Nice summary!

entry.title: Re: New sap set up login on my macbook
entry.content:
Hi, 

Try to enter: 

conn=/H/<application_server>/S/3200&clnt=<client>&user=<user_name>&lang=<language>

Regards, 

Carmelo.

entry.title: Re: Job Requisition mass upload
entry.content:
Hi ,

This can be achieved through Provisioning or Integration center.

However we had used Provisioning for the import of job requisitions.

Please refer the KBA - 2341614 - Legacy Data Migration - Importing Candidates, Requisitions, Applications via Provisioning - Recruiting Management - SAP for Me

Also you can refer Recruitment implementation guide for detailed steps.

Regards

Radhika

entry.title: Re: SAC Story Optimzed Mode: refreshing issue of the widg...
entry.content:
Hi William,
I created a ticket for this issue but I was hoping that someone has had this happen and could give some of advice or recommendation.

entry.title: Re: Skip, top, Orderby,expand parameter handling in CDS Based odata service
entry.content:
To be honest, I don't understand your question.  

You said that you have built a custom CDS view with RDS. So you should be able to test yourself and see whether $top and $skip are handeld correctly.

I would expect that an RDS based service should do this, if not, this is probably an error and you can raise a ticket.

However it is also not clear for me what you are doing when you write that you have created a custom CDS view to product master API_PRODUCT and customer master API_BUSINESS_PARTNER.
API_PRODUCT and API_BUSINESS_PARTNER are SEGW projects, not CDS views. So I am wondering what your custom CDS view looks like.
Here as always it would help to provide code snippets of what you have developed so it is easier to judge what might have gone wrong here.

Kind regards,

Andre

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hello.

I have been hearing about SAP from my friends telling me that there is a good career path in this line of work, and I have been curious about it for some time as I have been pondering for a long time to change career. Fortunately, I saw a post on Reddit specifically about this initiative leading me here. I am very interested to learn SAP and willing to put in hours in order to understand its fundamentals and processes as I think with the vast application of SAP there is a lot to learn and room for growth.

Thank you.

Regards,

Thirupathi.

entry.title: Setting up Open Content Network Implementation
entry.content:
The SuccessFactors Learning OCN option helps to track learners’ online learning without having to create or import the content, rather by signing up with an Open Content Network (OCN) provider and implementing the connection between SAP SuccessFactors Learning and that provider. The provider hosts the content and manages the content. SAP SuccessFactors Learning tracks the learners' content completion. The learning administrators select the content that they want to track and then assign that content like any other learning item in SAP SuccessFactors Learning.

Let us examine the high-level steps needed for OCN implementation:

1. Creating an OCN Administrator

To manage the courses, you need an OCN admin user. We recommend creating one admin user per vendor (content provider). Make sure to create a new OCN role and assign to the OCN admin user.

  •  The first step is to create a role with permissions for the OCN Admin user.
  • The second step is to create an OCN admin user and associate the role from step 1.
2. Registering the OCN Provider in Learning Administration

Please read the official document on Implementing Open Content Network to register the OCN provider in LMS including labels and logos.

3. Enabling an Open Content Network Third-Party Provider

Navigate to System Administration > Configuration > System Configuration > OPEN CONTENT NETWORK .

  • Supply the values for the new OCN vendor as shown below and remember to click on “Apply Changes” to store the values.
  • If the vendor you want to enable is pre-existing, for example, LYNDA,  or others, you may simply need to enable them.

Setting up values for the OCN Vendor

Once complete, navigate to Content > Open Content Network and verify if the new OCN provider appears on the screen as shown below.

 

Confirmation screen after registering the OCN vendor

  1. Switching to BizX Token Server

SAP SuccessFactors announced the deprecation of the Learning Token Server endpoint and hence all legacy API calls using the Learning Token Server is obsolete. We do not recommend using the Learning Token Server at all. Instead, all calls must refer to using the BizX Token Server. If you as a partner have been using the Learning Token Server, you must switch to the BizX Token Server. For detailed guidance led by system screenshots, please read through section 5.2.4 of the IDP.

5. Invoking OCN OData API calls

To make OCN OData API calls, you must follow the four steps shown below:

  • Generate SAML Assertion
  • Obtain SAML Token
  • (Optional) Validate SAML Token
  • Invoke OCN OData API calls

For detailed guidance led by system screenshots on invoking ODATA APIs, please read through section 5.2.5 of the IDP.

6. Including your AIR Key in all API calls

As SAP continues it’s digital transformation, it has introduced a new requirement for all partner applications that leverage the OData APIs to include what’s known as the Application Interface Register key, abbreviated as AIR Key. Please read the announcement here. 

7. Invoking a sample OData API call using the token from step 5

Copy the access token generated before and paste it to Authorization: Bearer + + access_token If your setup is correct, the response should resemble the screenshot. The response is displayed when you request the OCN metadata.

 

Sample API call to obtain OCN metadata via a token

8. Importing OCN metadata into SAP SuccessFactors Learning

The figure below shows a sample screenshot of the OCN metadata payload for importing OCN content into SAP SuccessFactors Learning.

 

Screenshot showing partial OCN metadata payload

Following considerations are important.

  • The authorization is Bearer + “ “+ Token if you are using raw or the same as in figure 5-27 if you are using simply setting Authorization to Bearer Token. Simply copy the token from the initial call. 
  • The [ and ] brackets in the request payload indicates that you can import an array of content separated by commas, up to a maximum of 1000 per import.
  • You must wait for another 5 minutes to do another batch of imports. This is strictly enforced by the system. No exceptions!
  • The full payload is documented in the OCN Implementation Guide. 
  • Start with a small batch to ensure that your payload structure is correct. 
  • The two URLs included in launchURL are visible externally. 
  • You must adjust your content to comply with additional locales as needed.
9. Verifying imported OCN metadata in SAP SuccessFactors Learning Administration

After importing OCN metadata into SAP SuccessFactors Learning, you can verify the contents by navigating to Content > Open Content Network as shown below and selecting the OCN vendor you have created.

 

Verifying the OCN metadata and optionally importing into LMS

For modifying Content Object and changing completion option for learning content universally or individually, please follow section 5.2.9 in the IDP that includes system screenshots making for an easier understanding.

10. Re-importing or Synchronizing metadata

Situations may arise where you may wish to update previously imported metadata in the Learning Admin UI. To do so, log in as an administrator and navigate to the System Administration interface. Navigate to the Automatic Processes tab and select “Open Content Network Content Synchronization”. Mark the checkbox for “Schedule This Process”:

  • Schedule as Daily
  • Confirm the time zone is correct
  • Modify the time to a few minutes in the future, then click “Apply Changes” to save.
 

Synchronizing metadata

11. Adding OCN Items to a Library

One way to manage bulk assignments is to associate the OCN courses with a Library. Navigate to Learning Administration > Learning Activities > Libraries and click on “Add New” .

 

Adding a new Library

12. Assigning the OCN Library to an Assignment Profile

You can assign an entire Library to an user/assignment Profile or assign individual items to a user/assignment profile.

If you have followed all the steps described above, you have successfully set up an OCN vendor in your customer’s tenant. The system is now ready for learners to undergo your OCN courses at your website. Congratulations!

SAP SuccessFactors Learning will not permit you to proxy in as another user to complete learning assignments. It’s therefore necessary to log in as the learner into the platform to undergo the learning assignment. Please refer to https://launchpad.support.sap.com/#/notes/2440835 for more information.

For a detailed description with system screenshots and further topics, I invite you to explore the IDP. Let us know in the comments how has been your experience in implementing an OCN.

entry.title: Re: Task 4 - Plain "REST" endpoint (July Developer Challenge - "Reverse APIs")
entry.content: Check your URL, you have to send an POST request to "/tester/testServer"

entry.title: Displaying Only Total Figures for Cost Elements in SAC Story
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I have a story in SAP Analytics Cloud where I have 1 to 9 series of cost elements. I want to show only the total figures for each series without displaying the details of each cost element. I do not want to use a chart; I just need to display the total numbers.

Can anyone guide me on how to do this?

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Re: How can we add the Private Key Alias in the channel c...
entry.content: Hi, thank you for your feedback. Our problem is related to AS2 Sender. The Trading Partner is sending a message and in this AS2 Sender we want to add the Private Key Alias.

entry.title: Re: CUSTOMER INVOICE FORM TEMPLATE
entry.content:
Dear Customer,

You can use string Upper() in Adobe LiveCycle Designer (ALD) to achieve this.

Please open your ByD system, go to work center Application and User Management, access view Download Center, find "Adobe LiveCycle Designer for SAP Business ByDesign" and click Download. After that, you can access view "Form Template Maintenance" in the same work center, find the form template that you want to adjust, click Download. Then, open the .xdp file with ADL, and try to use string Upper() for the field.

Regarding string Upper(), you can refer to this documentation from Adobe: https://help.adobe.com/en_US/livecycle/10.0/DesignerFormCalcRef/WS92d06802c76abadb-32254d55129f5ee7c98-7f98.html

Henry

SAP Support

entry.title: Re: Issue with cds-services-bom version >= 2.9.0
entry.content: I am not able to access these links, can you please share the details of your answer for this? It may help with our issue that has the same error message.

entry.title: Re: CI/CD Process Failed With Error
entry.content:
Hi 🙂

The build fails for any app (apps who used to go through CI/CD process with no issue before), UI5 app or any othe kind. In attachment, the logs of a basic node.js app.

It seems to be related to a Jenkins process, which is not my domain of expertise.

entry.title: Not able to deactivate work item
entry.content:
Currently when some one logs time under a time code in timesheet and then moves on to another project/role, we are unable to disable their access to the first code as they have already logged time there.

The only way the access to the first code can be removed is if we block/end that work package. However as there are other people using that code we can’t do this.

Sometimes this leads to incorrect time entries or some people just has a lot of codes in their timesheet which they don’t need to use anymore.

There is a functionality in S/4 to make the work item inactive. Once this is done a message is displayed that the work item is inactive and no more time can be booked using that work item. Example below.

However this does not work as the person can still view the code in their timesheet and continue logging time using the code.

Could any one please check why this functionality is not working and if this can be fixed. With projects of significant duration we are getting more issues with use of incorrect codes and many unnecessary codes showing up in people's timesheets.

entry.title: Not able to deactivate work item
entry.content:
Currently when some one logs time under a time code in timesheet and then moves on to another project/role, we are unable to disable their access to the first code as they have already logged time there.

The only way the access to the first code can be removed is if we block/end that work package. However as there are other people using that code we can’t do this.

Sometimes this leads to incorrect time entries or some people just has a lot of codes in their timesheet which they don’t need to use anymore.

There is a functionality in S/4 to make the work item inactive. Once this is done a message is displayed that the work item is inactive and no more time can be booked using that work item. Example below.

However this does not work as the person can still view the code in their timesheet and continue logging time using the code.

Could any one please check why this functionality is not working and if this can be fixed. With projects of significant duration we are getting more issues with use of incorrect codes and many unnecessary codes showing up in people's timesheets.

entry.title: Re: SAP BUSINESS ONE DI API crashes Application
entry.content:
Hi ANKIT_CHAUHAN, Johan_H

Thank's for your contributions. Meanwhile I found Note 3420349, which exactly describes the situation. Should already be included in FP2405.

Best Regards

Klaus

entry.title: SBPA - How to end a branch without ending the process
entry.content:
Hi Team,

I want to end a branch in the process without ending the process.Is there a way to implement that.Please help me with this.

Thanks & Regards,
Keerthana

entry.title: Re: Packaging items from a production order without packi...
entry.content:
Hi there,

it is possible to manually pack in COP2 as well, but it is a bit different than the way you would pack for delivery or free handling unit.

As a first step you can add the load carrier and enter how many pieces of it you need. Example below 4 Pallets.

Notice that the gray line shows the open (still not packed amount of material). 

After that in the line below it you can add the material and enter how many pieces should be packed on each pallet. So if you enter 4 like below

and press enter you will see that 16 pieces are packed and 4 pieces will still be open.

So you can either add one more pallet or you can use another packing material where you pack these and so on. Remember that you need to add the packed material in the line below the load carrier.

 

If you want to do a muli-level packing (Pallet with 4 boxes each containing 5 pieces of material) you have to add the next packing material below the load carrier and after pressing enter you can see that the level column is added and you can enter the amount of the next packing material. After that you add your material and you get the right proposal.

Whenever you are not happy with the result you can use the buttons on the left side to delete the lines and start over.

After you press save you can see the resulting Handling Units with their IDs:

Cheers and happy packing,

Ilina

LE Handling Unit Management

entry.title: SAP Build Apps Integration with SBPA (Task UI)
entry.content:
Hi Team,

Is it possible to use SAP Build Apps as the task UI in SAP Build Process Automation.

Thanks & Regards,
Keerthana

entry.title: Re: Can we run same application in neo and cloud foundry environment simultaneously?
entry.content: I am facing the similar issue, please let me know if you find any solution.

entry.title: Over-Delivery Qty Tolerance with the customer credit management
entry.content:
Hi all, Hope you are all doing well

There is a case when the credit limit for the customer is 100K $ and he already consumed 90K $ of the credit limit, then the customer requested a sales order with 10K $ with the remaining credit limit and he can release his order successfully, but in the outbound delivery level, the material was having a tolerance 5% more, which means the order value increased with 500 $ more than the customer credit limit.

What I need is to know if there are any functionality in the standard or customized way can make the system to allow to exceed the customer credit limit with the over-delivery tolerance amount only?

I appreciated your usual support, suggestions, consultations

entry.title: Re: Be Comfortable, Authentic and Interview the Interviewer 🧑🏻‍💻
entry.content: Nice way to conquer interviews, Kudos!

entry.title: Processes can now be scheduled 📅!
entry.content:
You can now schedule processes – not just automation bots – in SAP Build Process Automation.

Once you deploy your process:

  1. Go into Control Tower > Environments, and open your environment.
  2. Go to Triggers.
  3. Click Add Trigger.
  4. Schedule your process by setting a schedule and providing the needed inputs for the process.

A few things I noticed:

  • You seem to be able to have an API trigger and a schedule trigger at the same time.
  • At first, I could not find how to edit or delete the trigger. But then realized that it was a little off the screen, even with my browser at 100% zoom. 
  • Seems you must schedule recurrence, though you could just limit the timeframe to prevent this recurrence from happening.
  • It's all really easy to do 😺

Document is here: https://help.sap.com/docs/PRODUCTS/b078c7aa93ed4fc391e3323b7a255b84/b2b7113205ef42f688cf59ab9df4195c.html?locale=en-US&version=Cloud

entry.title: Re: CAP Multitenant req.on("succeeded") event handler does not resolve consumer destinatio
entry.content: No solution ?

entry.title: Re: Repeat value from previous cell when it is blank per...

entry.title: Re: SAP BTP ABAP Environment – Maintenance Windows and Major Upgrade Windows in 2024
entry.content: Currently, it is not intended to postpone a release upgrade according to a customer's schedule. Only in rare exceptional cases based on the findings of a pre-upgrade test, it might be required to postpone the upgrade. Please refer to the blog post about the pre-upgrade mentioned above.

entry.title: Deploying App using ABAP CDS Annotations
entry.content:
Hello,

I build an RAP-App using ABAP CDS including Annotations. I deployed the service with the service binding OData v4 - UI. There are a lot of tutorials showing how to generate a Fiori Elements Floorplans-based app using the service.

However, I was wondering what are the steps necessary to deploy this app in a productive environment to a Fiori launchpad? Is this document anywhere?

Thanks for your help

entry.title: Re: CI/CD Process Failed With Error
entry.content:
Hi :-),

In this log the npmExecuteScripts worked out just fine. Probably because there was no build script executed that does not work.

Instead it fails in the deployment with the following error:

[2024-07-15T11:58:08.581Z] info cloudFoundryDeploy - -----> Nodejs Buildpack version 1.8.25
[2024-07-15T11:58:08.581Z] warn cloudFoundryDeploy - [31;1m**WARNING**[0m buildpack version changed from 1.8.24 to 1.8.25
[2024-07-15T11:58:08.581Z] info cloudFoundryDeploy - -----> Bootstrapping python
[2024-07-15T11:58:08.581Z] info cloudFoundryDeploy - -----> Installing python 3.11.9
[2024-07-15T11:58:08.581Z] info cloudFoundryDeploy - Copy [/tmp/buildpacks/badd377bdd2a2a0d/dependencies/21946bb90387e2dbfa40b0d6ca474060/python_3.11.9_linux_x64_cflinuxfs4_dea1f79d.tgz]
[2024-07-15T11:58:11.108Z] info cloudFoundryDeploy - BuildpackCompileFailed - App staging failed in the buildpack compile phase
[2024-07-15T11:58:11.108Z] info cloudFoundryDeploy - FAILED

For that the BTP CF colleagues would be the right address. Maybe open a Service Now ticket for component BC-CP-CF providing the cloudFoundryDeploy specific log messages.

Cheers!
Oliver

please do the needful on that.

 

Regards,

Nikunj

entry.title: Fiori App for internal orders Group reporting - Private Cloud 2022
entry.content:
Dear All

I do not find a FIORI app using the internal orders Group, in other words, an app equivalent to the GUI transactions S_ALR_87012993 or KOB1.

In the app Internal Orders - Plan/Actuals (W0076), I didn't see the option to use Groups.

Thanks for your help.

BR

Julien

entry.title: Re: SAP BTP CPI - AMQP Adapter
entry.content:
Hi @Nijith 

Can you share why you need to read messages from the queue every 15 minutes? When you have AMQP Sender subscribed to a queue, it reads the messages from the queue as soon as they are posted there and starts the iFlow. You don't need to implement any scheduler separately. For general concepts of event-oriented architecture please see Event Mesh Default Plan Concepts.

Best regards,
Daniil

entry.title: Re: SAP C4C - User not able to see visits and calendars o...
entry.content:
Hi Indraneel,

Here is one blog which hope could help: https://community.sap.com/t5/crm-and-cx-blogs-by-sap/access-control-management-basics-of-access-control-and-business-roles/ba-p/13140393

Best Regards,
Molly

entry.title: ARM Configuration in SAP EWM
entry.content:
Hi ,

We have an issue in ARM Customer returns. A return sales order is created with Follow-Up Activity 0001-Receive into plant and OBD is created. Using /SCWM/PRDI, GR is done in EWM. In ECC outbound delivery updated with movement type 657 and material document also posted with 657. Using MSR_INSPWH we have done material inspection with Inspection code: SA(OK) and Follow Up Activity: 0015-Transfer to Specified stock and Target Storage location: XXXX(Different one than the one in OBD), Stock type: Blank ie Unrestricted. As per process a new Delivery is created, here we have issue:

1)In this delivery, storage location in the line item is not the one provided XXXX during material inspection. System picked old storage location.

2)In this delivery, movement type 343 is used by system but in EWM stock in B1 ie Blocked for putaway.

Do we need to activate any BC sets or missing any configuration related to ARM in EWM. Please let us know.

entry.title: Re: eInvoice Email-Process - Process Status is stuck on "...
entry.content:
Dear Lukas,

Having no participant activated in Peppol for the E-Mail scenario is perfectly fine.
For technical reasons, it must still be created in the Participants App, but nothing beyond that.
However, this should not be the root cause for your issue. The issue in your case is that asynchronous feedback messages related to the validation of invoice is not properly sent back to S/4 HANA Public Cloud. Usually this is either due to an incorrect Push URL maintained in the BTP destination or authentication issues with S/4 HANA Public Cloud.

Regards, Uwe

entry.title: Re: SAP S4 Hana PPAP Level Details
entry.content: PPAP process mapping identified so closing the thread.Thank you all.

entry.title: Position workflow
entry.content:
Dear community experts,

We would need to configure in Employee Central a business rule which can trigger WF when different changes are made on the position level.

We are currently facing a challenge because the WF is not getting triggered when on the Parent Position level changes are made. We added in the conditions the value: Position.Parent Position is not equal to OriginalValues.Parent Position , but was unsuccessful.

I would appreciate if you had some ideas on this challenge.

Best regards,

Eli

entry.title: Re: SAP BTP CPI - AMQP Adapter
entry.content: I am aware that AMQP reads messages as soon as it's posted into a queue and my use case does not sync with event driven arch .My use case is that I have an iflow A which calls a service which triggers a job internally and returns an ID.I store this I'd in a queue.And after every 15 minutes pickup this Id from the queue using Ifalow B and check the status of the job if it's complete.If it's comple remove the message from the queue else repush it into queue ,so that I can check if it's completed the next time.

entry.title: Advanced Event Mesh or APIM when to use what?
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

The business requirement is as follows:-  when ever something changes to material (or) new material gets created then the details like quantity, price etc, to be sent to partner system.

We are in initial discussion on what to use when among Advanced Event Mesh(AEM) or APIM?

Does AEM makes sense only in case of Asynchronous publish subscribe model?

End to end message flow would be something like below.

SAP SRM -> BTP app -> Partner system.

 Can you recommend what to use when among AEM or APIM or API?

KR,

Ramu

entry.title: iRPA Custom Action - possible values
entry.content:
Hi,

When doing a Custom Action in "SAP Intelligent RPA Cloud Studio", you have to provide the Action Name.

When doing a recording on clicking on the second row of a grid, custom action name was "set_currentCellColumn". This custom action recorded has inactive the field of Action Name and their parameters.

When duplicating this action step, you have the possibility to put your desired custom action name and parameters.

As per documentation here SAP Intelligent RPA Cloud Studio User Guide.

Does anyone know where all possible action names could be found in SAP docs?

entry.title: how to clean tasklog for Prod
entry.content:
Dear, 

how to clean up tasklog


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: how to clean tasklog for Prod
entry.content:
SAP Hybris recommends to cleanup the TaskLogs table periodically.

The information contained in this table can be interesting for an audit trail. Make sure to backup your database and only cleanup this table if you are sure you will not need these log entries anymore.

A valid approach to cleanup the TaskLogs could be to implement the MaintenanceCleanupStrategy to remove logs for processes that are in the SUCCEEDED state and that where completed before a certain number of days.




Here is sample groovy script to clean up tasklog

 

import de.hybris.platform.core.Registry
import de.hybris.platform.core.model.task.TaskLogModel
import de.hybris.platform.servicelayer.search.FlexibleSearchQuery
import de.hybris.platform.servicelayer.search.SearchResult
import de.hybris.platform.servicelayer.search.impl.DefaultFlexibleSearchService
import de.hybris.platform.servicelayer.model.ModelService

// Get the FlexibleSearchService and ModelService
FlexibleSearchService flexibleSearchService = Registry.getApplicationContext().getBean("flexibleSearchService")
ModelService modelService = Registry.getApplicationContext().getBean("modelService")

// Specify the number of days to keep TaskLog entries
int daysToKeep = 30

// Calculate the cutoff date
Calendar calendar = Calendar.getInstance()
calendar.add(Calendar.DAY_OF_YEAR, -daysToKeep)
Date cutoffDate = calendar.getTime()

// Create a FlexibleSearch query to find TaskLog entries older than the cutoff date
String queryString = "SELECT {pk} FROM {TaskLog} WHERE {creationtime} < ?cutoffDate"
FlexibleSearchQuery query = new FlexibleSearchQuery(queryString)
query.addQueryParameter("cutoffDate", cutoffDate)

// Execute the query
SearchResult<TaskLogModel> result = flexibleSearchService.search(query)

// Delete the old TaskLog entries
result.getResult().each { taskLog ->
    try {
        modelService.remove(taskLog)
        println "Deleted TaskLog entry with PK: ${taskLog.pk}"
    } catch (Exception e) {
        println "Failed to delete TaskLog entry with PK: ${taskLog.pk} due to: ${e.message}"
    }
}

println "TaskLog cleanup complete. Deleted ${result.getResult().size()} entries older than ${daysToKeep} days."

entry.title: Can we use BP person created in Quality Notification for Task Header as well as under Item Task
entry.content:
Hi Gurus

Is there possibility to create a person using BP transaction in S4 Hana and use it under Quality Notification process under Header level Tasks as well as Item level task ? 

I tried creating on sample data but system error is shown as below. Kindly share some inputs on the same.

Currently I used PPOC / PPOME to map the group of mail IDs as this is under HR module so checking feasibility to map data created using BP transaction codes.

Person created with T Code BP

 Regards

Vignesh V

entry.title: Query for which sales order lines has the discount or price been adjusted
entry.content:
Hi,

We are a company with a total of 10 branches. All branches work with sales orders. The employees at the branches have total control over sales orders. They can manually adjust discounts and prices on the customer order. This is also necessary and I therefore do not want to block it.

However, I would like to check the order lines that have been manually adjusted. This mainly concerns the price and the discount percentage. So I am looking for a query that shows me at line level which prices and discounts have been adjusted compared to the standard data entered in price lists, discount groups and special prices for business partners.

For example, an employee checks out a bag of apples. SAP automatically fills in the 20% discount percentage entered for item groups as standard. The employee adjusts the discount percentage to 30%.

Is something so simple to do? Or is this going to be a complicated query?

Thanks

entry.title: Re: What is Simple Credit check??
entry.content: Simple Credit Check means: Just check the Value of your order + Open deliveries + Billing + Invoice Doc whose payment is not received and if it exceeds with Assigned Credit limit then Do only 2 Actions [1] either show Warning message and let the order save, so it is just a precausnary step to inform that Limit is exxeded and one need to think about it otherwise Order might be created but delivery will not be agreed.. [2] or Show error message and Stop saving this order. This means untill and unless Credit Limit will not be increased , you can not create sales order with this much amount. Note: there is no way to generate any Third document which will allow you to approve or reject Sales Order here in classical Credit Management, Whereas in Latest FSCM Credit Management this concept has been introduced to decide based on DCD, so this new one is known as Automatic credit control.

entry.title: Re: SAP BTP CPI - AMQP Adapter
entry.content: In this case, you should use Datastore, Variable or external database (via JDBC) to store the ID. Then you can trigger the process to pickup this ID and check the status of the job via Scheduler.

entry.title: Re: How to trigger Build Process Automation (BPA) workflo...
entry.content:
I will see if I can find a better tutorial, but here is one that shows you how to do it the "old  way" (meaning making an API call) from SAP Build Apps, and it would work pretty much the same way for you.

  1. Create destination, as described here: https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/spa-create-service-instance-destination.html (this also may be created automatically for you when you install Process Automation)
  2. Make API call as described here: https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/build-apps-workflow-trigger.html#23115af3-8c2e-487a-b50a-ecdc7c8a8fce (step 5)
    • Call the POST API (2nd one on the page) as described in this API reference: https://api.sap.com/api/SPA_Workflow_Runtime/path/post_v1_workflow_instances
    • You need to send as header Content-Type as application/json, and in the payload you need to send as it shows in process automation for your process. To find payload, go to the SAP Build environment where you deployed the process, under Triggers find the trigger you created for your process, and select View (all the way to the right). Now you will see the payload you need to send. 

I will try to find a tutorial showing it from JavaScript, for example, from BAS. But I think you'll get the ID from the above.

entry.title: Re: XML contains errors and cannot be processed
entry.content:
Dear Gary,
This error message is unfamiliar for us and might indicate an underlying XML generation issue. Therefore it would be beneficial to investigate it in your system. Would you please open an incident on component CA-GTF-CSC-EDO-DE?
Regards,
Uwe

entry.title: Re: ABAP list's column width are not uniform.
entry.content:
You didn't say what code you have used to generate this ABAP List (WRITE, ALV, etc.)

The shift may happen if you have full-width/double-byte characters (CJK East-Asian, etc.) You may have to use the class CL_ABAP_LIST_UTILITIES to calculate the output lengths, etc. (see its documentation).

entry.title: Re: CUSTOMER INVOICE FORM TEMPLATE
entry.content:
Dear,

I assume you want to remove the "/ 1 EACH" as you work with unit prices. Thus it is advised to rename your column to 'unit price' for clarity.

Default you get this:

- Column Net Price is filled up by the logic under Subform FrmPrice with its binding and scripting. It is the scripting that creates the concatenation of quantity / currency and base quantity with unit of measure. 

To adjust it and remove the base quantity with unit of measure you need to alter the scripting and remove the part in the concatenation (highlighted in red)

Scripting:

/ Concatenate the 'Net Price' value and currency if they are not initial
var content = "";

if (not this.decPrice.isNull)
then
content = Concat(content,this.decPrice.formattedValue);
if (not this.txtPriceCurrency.isNull)
then
content = Concat(content, " " , this.txtPriceCurrency.rawValue );
if ( not this.decBaseQuantity.isNull &
not this.txtBaseQuantityUnit.isNull )
then
content = Concat(content, " / " , this.decBaseQuantity.rawValue , " " , this.txtBaseQuantityUnit.rawValue);
endif
endif
endif
// Copy the concatenated value the visible field 'Net Price' of the table
if(content <> "")
then
FormInvoiceRequest.bdyMain.frmTableBlock.tblTable.rowItem.colPrice.rawValue = content;
endif

>>

Change the line in red to:

content = Concat(content);

That is an easy way to change it. But obviously you need to be certain that you do not have price definition other than unit pricing else you will show wrong pricing information.

KR,

Steve

entry.title: Integrate Jira with SAP CPI - Create Jira ticket via SAP CPI
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I am trying to integrate with the Jira to create a ticket/issue via SAP CPI to reduce the usage of the third part tool which does the same thing. 

I have referred the below blogs and tried to create a sample IFlow in the sap cpi but unfortunately, I am unable to proceed further due to the error encountered which states as below. 

The Jira Cloud platform REST API (atlassian.com)

org.apache.camel.component.ahc.AhcOperationFailedException: HTTP operation failed invoking https://<hostname>/rest/api/2/issue/ with statusCode: 415

FYI, I am able to get the details of the existing ticket but unable to create the ticket via CPI. But managed to create the ticket via POSTMAN.

Sample IFLow.

 

Payload used:

{
"fields": {
"project": {
"key": "SDC"
},
"summary": "Demo ticket from the CPI via API",
"issuetype": {
"name": "Task"
},
"description": "PLEASE IGNORE THIS ISSUE TICKET",
"assignee": {
"name": "Imran"
},
"labels": [
"Demo"
]
}
}

Please advice on this. Thanks in Advance

entry.title: Re: How to call public cloud SAP API from embedded steamp...
entry.content:
Small update from my side, in case anyone else stumbles onto the topic... it can be done.

Although the documentation of the credit memo request states that it can be extended with custom fields, those fields do not work everywhere. There still are areas in which you will not find them. Unfortunately for us, the EML TP object is one of those. Reached out to SAP, they've investigated and replied that it's currently not supported and we can use the customer influence program to raise the issue. Which we will do, but that does not help us at this time.

The way I was able to make the public API work from an on-stack piece of programming is to have two communication arrangements pointing to the same communication system (the S/4 HANA Cloud Public Edition system), using the same communication user. I guess that previously when trying to find the correct interface, a connection through the same system could not be found.

I was so close, just a connection away. At last now I know what it was. I reckon once we get used to the way of working, it'll all become easier. And perhaps even make sense 😉

entry.title: Re: A Table Can Be Joined With a Maximum of one other table using Left Outer Join Error
entry.content: I'm not answering the question about ABAP 7.31, but in the future, you should develop first in ABAP 7.31, make it work, and it should work on ABAP 7.40, because like in many other programming languages, ABAP versions have ascending compatibility, not descending compatibility.

As a result, I'm looking for alternative methods to send notifications within SAP Build Process Automation.
Are there other options available for sending notifications, and if so, could you provide some details on those alternatives?

entry.title: Re: Position workflow

Please don't post to Questions about SAP Websites (issue with community Website, etc.) if it's a question about SAP software. Instead, ask in Technology Q&A: https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/qa-p/technology-questions.

Hopefully someone will fix it for you.

entry.title: Position Workflow
entry.content:
Dear community experts,

We would need to configure in Employee Central a business rule which can trigger WF when different changes are made on the position level.

We are currently facing a challenge because the WF is not getting triggered when on the Parent Position level changes are made. We added in the conditions the value: Position.Parent Position is not equal to OriginalValues.Parent Position , but was unsuccessful.

I would appreciate if you had some ideas on this challenge.

Best regards,

Eli
